description: The background-check adjudication the CRA rendered for an order, as produced by the external system of record (e.g. Accurate Background's Scoring engine: candidate lastName PASS -> 'MEETS REQUIREMENTS', REVIEW -> 'NEEDS REVIEW'). Notarize-only: AGLedger NOTARIZES what the CRA rendered; it does NOT render the adjudication. The SoR-seam capture: which order, which CRA report, the verbatim customer-facing result label, AND the normalized engine outcome (the label is client-customizable, so the normalized enum is what the gate bands on). engineOutcome=pass can terminate clean (auto-clear at the adjudication gate); needs-review or fail is the adverse-capable input the gate routes to a human individualized assessment. reportHash binds the exact report bytes the candidate has a right to a copy of (FCRA 615(a)) so 'the report we adjudicated == the report we disclosed' is provable.

orderRef.description: recordId of the ironvale-screening-order-v1 this adjudication belongs to.

cra.description: The CRA that rendered the adjudication.

reportId.description: The CRA-side report identifier (cross-reference into the SoR).

orderResult.description: The customer-facing result label the CRA returned, captured VERBATIM (e.g. 'MEETS REQUIREMENTS', 'NEEDS REVIEW'). Client-customizable labels -> free-form so a faithful disposition is never rejected.

engineOutcome.description: The CRA Scoring engine's NORMALIZED outcome, mapped from the verbatim label to a closed enum. pass = cleared; needs-review = inconclusive, human review; fail = disqualifying record found. This is what the adjudication gate bands on (the label is customizable and cannot be banded reliably). Mapping the label -> enum is the SoR-seam adapter's job and is on-chain as this record.

assessedAt.description: When the CRA rendered the adjudication (from the CRA order/report).

reportHash.description: Hex digest of the exact consumer-report bytes the CRA produced — binds 'the report adjudicated' to 'the report disclosed to the candidate' (FCRA 615(a) copy).

packageType.description: The package the report covers (echo of the order).
